claim: n8n aims to reach $1 billion annual recurring revenue (ARR) with fewer than 500 employees.
n8n was founded in 2019 by Jan (the founder).
The company has turned down investors over ethical concerns.
Candice is the Senior Talent Acquisition Manager at n8n.
n8n describes itself as a community‑first, builder‑driven company that builds AI orchestration tools.
n8n has built over 400 pre-configured integrations.
n8n offers more than 10,000 workflow automation templates.
n8n provides built-in AI nodes that can summarize or answer questions from documents.
n8n supports self‑hosting via Docker or Kubernetes in minutes, including air‑gapped private network deployments.
The community version of n8n is free, while an enterprise license is paid.
n8n uses a Git‑based source control system to manage environments with pull‑request workflows.
n8n allows one‑click deployment of workflows to production and supports multiple execution modes such as queue mode.
n8n has 194.2k stars on GitHub, placing it among the top 50 most popular projects.
n8n holds a 4.9 out of 5 star rating on G2.
n8n’s community includes over 200,000 members.
n8n supports integration with over 500 different applications and services.
n8n offers a self‑hosted, on‑premises deployment option using Docker.
n8n provides enterprise security features such as SSO/SAML, LDAP, encrypted secret stores, RBAC permissions, audit logs, and log streaming to SIEMs.
n8n’s Git‑based control includes isolated environments, multi‑user workflows, and workflow diffs.
A case study reports that Huel saved 1,000 hours of manual work by using n8n.
A case study reports that Vodafone saved £2.2 million using n8n’s SOAR capabilities.
All n8n plans include unlimited users and unlimited workflows.
Pricing is based on monthly workflow executions, regardless of complexity.
The Starter plan costs 20 € per month when billed annually, saving 17% compared to monthly billing.
The Starter plan provides 2,500 workflow executions per month with unlimited steps.
The Starter plan includes 1 shared project, 5 concurrent executions, and 50 AI Workflow Builder credits.
The Pro plan costs 50 € per month when billed annually.
The Pro plan provides 10,000 workflow executions per month with unlimited steps.
The Pro plan adds 3 shared projects, 20 concurrent executions, 7 days of insights, and 150 AI Workflow Builder credits.
The Business plan costs 667 € per month when billed annually.
The Business plan offers 40,000 workflow executions per month with unlimited steps.
The Business plan includes 6 shared projects, SSO/SAML/LDAP, 30 days of insights, and upcoming AI Workflow Builder.
The Enterprise plan requires contacting sales for a custom number of workflow executions.
Enterprise customers can choose hosted by n8n or self‑hosted deployment.
Enterprise plan adds unlimited shared projects, 200+ concurrent executions, 365 days of insights, and 1,000 AI Workflow Builder credits (cloud only).
Enterprise plan provides dedicated support with SLA, invoice billing, and extended data retention.
A Start‑up Plan offers 50% off the Business plan for companies with under 20 employees.
n8n’s Community Edition is a free, self‑hosted version available on GitHub.
Free trials for Starter and Pro plans grant access to all Pro features without a credit card.
The Business plan free trial requires a credit card and lasts 14 days.
The n8n main repository has 194,464 stars, 58,926 forks, is written in TypeScript, has 1,469 open issues, and its last push was on 2026-06-29T11:15:47Z.
n8n is described as a fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities, offering visual building, custom code, self‑hosted or cloud deployment, and 400+ integrations.
The self‑hosted AI Starter Kit repository has 15,012 stars, 3,787 forks, and its last push was on 2026-01-06T14:08:21Z.
The n8n-docs repository has 1,676 stars, 4,284 forks, and its last push was on 2026-06-29T10:18:51Z.
The n8n-hosting repository has 1,657 stars, 840 forks, is written in Go Template, and its last push was on 2026-06-17T16:28:55Z.
The n8n-nodes-starter repository has 1,111 stars, 676 forks, is written in TypeScript, and its last push was on 2026-06-29T07:53:12Z.
Primary programming languages across n8n repositories are Go Template, Shell, and TypeScript.

verdict.bull: Strong open-source community and product with AI capabilities, clear pricing, and ambitious growth target.
verdict.bear: Limited team information, no revenue data, and high competition in automation space.

risk_matrix.reason: Limited information on team; only founder and one talent acquisition manager mentioned, no details on key hires or experience.
Ambitious $1B ARR goal with <500 employees, but no current revenue or customer metrics provided.
Strong product with 400+ integrations, AI capabilities, self-hosting, and high GitHub stars, indicating robust engineering.
Competitive workflow automation market, but n8n's fair-code model and community adoption (194k stars) provide differentiation.
Clear pricing tiers, but no revenue or funding data; reliance on self-hosted free version may limit monetization.

section_summaries.overview: n8n is a fair-code, community-driven workflow automation platform with native AI, offering unlimited users and workflows, 400+ integrations, and a strong open-source presence (194k GitHub stars, 4.9 G2 rating).
section_summaries.engineering: The platform supports self-hosting, has extensive integrations and AI capabilities, and is built with TypeScript, with active development across multiple repositories and features like Git-based source control.
section_summaries.hiring: Hiring information is limited, with only a mention of a Senior Talent Acquisition Manager and free trial details.
section_summaries.traction: The company has set an ambitious goal of reaching $1B ARR with fewer than 500 employees, indicating high growth expectations.
